scenario: Illustrative mock filer: Anna Lindqvist, a Swedish resident employed full-time by a single employer in Gothenburg, who owns her house, paid for RUT-eligible home-cleaning services during 2025, and holds a small bank savings/investment account. She has no foreign income, no business activity, no capital losses, and requests no ROT/RUT reallocation. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real filer's information.
